# writeHeader(_:)

**Instance Method**

Writes an entry header.

## Declaration

```swift
func writeHeader(_ header: ArchiveHeader) throws
```

## Parameters

- **header**: The entry header to which the operation writes.

## Reading and Writing Headers

- **readHeader()**: Reads the next entry header.
